zh.lifeSummary: 當Louis IV de Chiny於1172年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯艾維斯斯時，他的父親Louis III de Chiny31歲，母親Sophie d'Aspremont28歲。他於大約1206年與Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。他去世於1226年11月10日在法國米迪-列內斯羅特卡斯享年54歲，埋葬在比利時盧布格福洛倫維爾維勒斯-德凡吉瓦爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Louis IV de Chiny于1172年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯艾維斯斯时，他的父亲Louis III de Chiny31岁，母亲Sophie d'Aspremont28岁。他于大约1206年与Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。他去世于1226年11月10日在法国米迪-列內斯羅特卡斯享年54岁，埋葬在比利时盧布格福洛倫維爾維勒斯-德凡吉瓦爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Chiny
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surnames 荊, 景, 井, 敬, 靖 and 經, see   Jing   1-6.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surname 程, see   Cheng   1.

variants.name: Chinn
meanings: English: from Old English cin ‘chin’, as a nickname for someone with a prominent chin or else for a clean-shaven man.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 陳 (see   Chen   1) and 錢 (see   Qian   1).

nameMeanings.name: Louis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

variants.name: Lewie
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Louis  , or a pet form of   Lewis .

variants.name: Louie
meanings: Variant spelling of   Lewie   or   Louis  , currently in fashion.

variants.name: Lewi
meanings: form, since the Middle Ages, of the French name Louis . In modern use it is also in part a transferred use of the surname derived from this given name, or from Anglicized forms of Gaelic Mac Lughaidh ‘son of Lughaidh ’ or Welsh Llewelyn .

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Louis IV de Chiny was born in 1172, in Avesnes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Louis III de Chiny, was 31 and his mother, Sophie d'Aspremont, was 28. He married Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes about 1206. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. He died on 10 November 1226, in Cahors, Lot, Midi-Pyrénées, France, at the age of 54, and was buried in Villers-devant-Orval, Florenville, Luxembourg, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Louis IV de Chiny est né en 1172, à Avesnes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Louis III de Chiny, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Sophie d'Aspremont, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes environ 1206. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Il est décédé le 10 novembre 1226, à Cahors, Lot, Midi-Pyrénées, France, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Villers-devant-Orval, Florenville, Luxembourg, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Louis IV de Chiny 1172 in Avesnes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Louis III de Chiny 31 und seine Mutter Sophie d'Aspremont 28. Er hat um 1206 Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Er starb am 10. November 1226 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Cahors, Lot, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich und wurde in Villers-devant-Orval, Florenville, Luxemburg, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Louis IV de Chiny è nato il nel 1172 nel Avesnes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Louis III de Chiny, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Sophie d'Aspremont, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes circa 1206. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Morì il 10 novembre 1226, nel Cahors, Lot, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Villers-devant-Orval, Florenville, Lussemburgo, Belgio.

ja.lifeSummary: Louis IV de Chinyが1172年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスエイベスンスで生まれた時，父Louis III de Chinyは31歳，母Sophie d'Aspremontは28歳であった。約1206年にMahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼は1226年11月10日にフランスミディ-プイルeンeスロトカホルズで54歳で死去し，ベルギールクセンボウルグフロアンヴィルヴィラース-デヴァント-オルヴァルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Louis IV de Chiny(이)가 1172년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 에베스네스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Louis III de Chiny(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Sophie d'Aspremont(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1206년 Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1226년 11월 10일 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 로트 카호르스에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 루세보우르그 플로렌빌 비레르스-데베아트-르발에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Louis IV de Chiny nasceu em 1172, em Avesnes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Louis III de Chiny, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Sophie d'Aspremont, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes aproximadamente 1206. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de novembro de 1226, em Cahors, Lot, Midi-Pyrénées, França, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Villers-devant-Orval, Florenville, Luxemburgo, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Louis IV de Chiny родился в 1172 г. в местности авеснесь, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Louis III de Chiny было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Sophie d'Aspremont, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes около 1206 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Он умер 10 ноября 1226 г. в местности кахаурс, лот, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности виллирс-девант-орваль, флоренвилл, луксембург, Бельгия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Louis IV de Chiny nació en 1172, en Avesnes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Louis III de Chiny, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Sophie d'Aspremont, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes aproximadamente 1206. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Murió el 10 de noviembre de 1226, en Cahors, Lot, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Villers-devant-Orval, Florenville, Luxemburgo, Bélgica.
